title: XAUUSD Backtest
author: remi4845
summary_bullets: TradingView indicator: XAUUSD Backtest by remi4845.
This is a strategy conversion of Viprasol's Sniper Confluence Entry/Exit indicator, tuned for XAUUSD on the 30-minute timeframe.
It combines 7 confluence factors to generate high-quality long and short signals, exiting on the opposite signal.
Confluence factors scored on every bar: VWAP position, RSI (14), MACD trend, EMA cross (9/21), ADX trend strength, volume confirmation, and secondary timeframe RSI.
A minimum score of 4/7 is required for a signal to fire.
Entries trigger on a confirmed … Source URL: https://www.tradingview.com/script/667oBGMl-XAUUSD-Backtest/.
